segments.speaker: Sarah
segments.text: Alright, let's get started. John, thanks for joining us today. We're going to go through everything we discussed in the proposal and figure out next steps.

segments.speaker: John
segments.text: Sounds good. I'm excited to get things moving.

segments.speaker: Sarah
segments.text: Great. So the first thing we need to tackle is updating the proposal with the Q2 pricing. Mark, can you handle that? I think it should take about two hours.

segments.speaker: Mark
segments.text: Sure, I'll get that done by end of week.

segments.speaker: Sarah
segments.text: Perfect. The second item — John, we need to set up your analytics dashboard. Someone on the team will need to configure Looker for your account. That's probably a four-hour job.

segments.speaker: John
segments.text: That would be great. We need the monthly report by the 5th of every month, without exception.

segments.speaker: Sarah
segments.text: Noted. We'll make sure that's in the requirements. Last thing — I need to send a follow-up email to John summarizing everything we discussed today. I'll do that myself, should take about 30 minutes.

segments.speaker: Mark
segments.text: Also, we should build out the campaign report template in Looker. That's going to be a bigger task, probably around four hours for the dev team.

segments.speaker: Sarah
segments.text: Good call. Let's add that to the list. Alright, I think that covers everything. John, any questions?

segments.speaker: John
segments.text: No, I think we're good. Thanks for the thorough walkthrough.

summary: Intake call with John from the client team. Discussed Q2 pricing updates, analytics dashboard setup in Looker, monthly reporting requirements, and campaign report template creation.
highlights: Q2 pricing proposal update needed — Mark to handle, ~2 hours
Looker analytics dashboard setup required — ~4 hours
Monthly report due by the 5th of every month
Follow-up email to client — Sarah, ~30 minutes
Campaign report template in Looker — dev team, ~4 hours
